origin: 農民曆工廠 card_main_0331.jpg 人像外觀，園藝戶外版
role: EP54 園藝也是運動 — 真人主持人角色（Seedance 影片用）

face.shape: gentle square jaw with soft V-line contour, high cheekbones, small delicate chin
face.skin: flawless porcelain-clear complexion, dewy luminous glass skin, no blemishes, no freckles
face.eyes: gentle downturned monolid-to-subtle-double-eyelid eyes, dark brown iris, soft feminine gaze
face.brows: straight fluffy textured brows, natural and groomed
face.nose: high straight bridge, refined small tip, delicate nostrils
face.lips: subtle natural pout, soft gradient pink lips (inner pink fading outward), petite mouth

hair.style: low ponytail with soft face-framing wispy strands, practical for outdoor work

makeup.base: Korean glass-skin base, dewy luminous, barely-there
makeup.lips: gradient glossy lips, inner pink fading outward
makeup.eyes: clean bare eyelids, zero eyeshadow, no false lashes
makeup.overall: Korean editorial natural — serene, clean, effortless

ep54_primary.description: Cream linen button-up shirt, sleeves rolled to elbows, over sage green cotton tank top
ep54_primary.color_inner: muted sage green (#A8B88A), matches brand palette
ep54_primary.bottoms: khaki wide-leg cropped pants, comfortable garden-ready
ep54_primary.accessories: woven straw sun hat (carried or worn loosely), simple leather-strap wristwatch
ep54_primary.footwear: canvas slip-on garden shoes, cream/natural color

kneeling_planting.description: Kneeling on garden soil, both hands in dirt, planting a seedling, looking up at camera with satisfied smile

standing_watering.description: Standing with watering can, pouring water over plants, relaxed posture, one hand on hip

squatting_pruning.description: Proper squat posture (knees bent, back straight), pruning herbs with small scissors, focused expression

stretching_garden.description: Standing up from garden work, stretching arms overhead, relieved happy expression, garden behind her

holding_harvest.description: Holding a small basket of fresh herbs and vegetables at waist level, proud warm smile toward camera

seedance_character_prompt.en: Beautiful Korean-style East Asian female, age 23-25. Gentle square jaw with soft V-line contour, high cheekbones, small delicate chin. Gentle downturned eyes, subtle double eyelids, dark brown iris. Straight fluffy textured brows. High straight nose bridge, refined small tip. Subtle natural pout, soft gradient pink lips. Flawless porcelain-clear complexion, dewy luminous glass skin. Long straight dark black-brown hair in low ponytail with face-framing wispy strands. Korean glass-skin makeup, soft peach blush, gradient glossy lips, bare eyelids. Wearing cream linen button-up shirt sleeves rolled to elbows over sage green cotton tank top, khaki wide-leg cropped pants. No logos, no loud prints.
seedance_character_prompt.zh_cn: 韩系清新风格的东亚成年女性，23-25岁。柔和方下颌V线轮廓，高颧骨，小巧下巴。温柔下垂眼，微双眼皮，深棕色虹膜。平直蓬松自然眉。高挺鼻梁，精致鼻尖。自然微嘟嘴，渐变粉色唇。无瑕瓷白水润玻璃肌，无雀斑。长直深黑棕发扎低马尾，脸两侧有碎发。韩系玻璃肌妆容，淡桃色腮红，渐变水润唇，素眼皮。穿米白亚麻衬衫袖卷至肘，内搭鼠尾草绿背心，卡其阔腿九分裤。无标志无花哨图案。

scene_styling_notes.lighting: Natural outdoor golden-hour sunlight, warm and directional, dappled tree shadow patterns on ground
scene_styling_notes.color_grading: Warm earthy tones, golden-green palette, slight film grain — natural outdoor documentary feel
scene_styling_notes.background_mood: Community garden / rooftop garden / home balcony garden, lush green plants, soil textures, natural wood raised beds
scene_styling_notes.camera: Medium to medium close-up, shallow DOF with green bokeh, handheld slight movement for documentary feel
scene_styling_notes.negative: no cartoon, no anime, no plastic skin, no studio lighting, no indoor scenes (except closing), no harsh shadows, no neon colors, no cluttered props, no text on clothing

brand_integration.palette_alignment: cream linen shirt (#F0E8D8) + sage green tank (#A8B88A) + warm earth/soil tones = brand-native outdoor version
brand_integration.mascot_coexistence: 花姐姐 appears in Seedance video scenes; 小靜 appears only in Part2 closing segment. They interact in the garden setting — 小靜 hops onto a flowerpot.
brand_integration.tone: Warm, encouraging, down-to-earth — affirming existing gardening habits as real exercise
